data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T07:20 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
Deacon, checking in. I need to execute immediately - hook is already loaded with work.

The hook shows: `skogtown-wisp-wisp-0rlgv` - a mol-deacon-patrol epic.

All children are marked as completed (✓):
- ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-2319d: Check for orphaned processes
- ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-mql5q: Check inbox for lifecycle requests and messages
- ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-p1jrb: Scan agent health


- ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-t1tk5: Decide: loop or hand off

Everything's done, so I'm updating the heartbeat and checking the mol status to determine whether to loop back or hand off.

? skogtown-wisp-wisp-mjwmme [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-23 · Updated: 2026-02-23

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).
